name: Teamworks Athlete Management Platform API
what_it_does: Teamworks athlete management platform REST API for professional sports teams, college athletic departments, and national governing bodies to manage athlete schedules, communications, and operations. Enables AI agents to manage athlete schedule creation and travel itinerary distribution for professional sports operations automation, handle team communication and broadcast messaging for sports organization communication automation, access athlete profile and roster management for team administration automation, retrieve facility and resource scheduling for athletic operations automation, manage compliance and recruiting calendar for college athletic program automation, handle meal and nutrition plan distribution for sports nutrition automation, access equipment request and gear management for team equipment workflow automation, retrieve medical and athletic training appointment scheduling for sports medicine automation, manage equipment issue and inventory tracking for team gear management automation, and integrate Teamworks with sports analytics platforms, travel booking tools, and league scheduling systems for end-to-end athlete operations management.
use_cases: Distributing schedules from sports operations automation agents
Broadcasting communications from team notification agents
Managing compliance calendars from college athletics agents
Booking facilities from athletic resource scheduling agents
not_for: Youth and recreational sports management (use TeamSnap)
Sports analytics and performance data (use Catapult or Kinexon)
best_when: A professional sports team, college athletic department, or national sports governing body wanting AI agents to automate athlete schedule distribution, team communications, compliance calendar management, and athletic operations within Teamworks as the enterprise athlete management platform.
avoid_when: HIPAA ATHLETE MEDICAL INFORMATION IN SPORTS PLATFORM: Automated access to athlete medical records, injury status, and treatment plans via Teamworks requires HIPAA compliance and appropriate data use authorization; automated medical data sharing with coaching staff beyond medical clearance status creates HIPAA and athlete health confidentiality violation. NCAA RECRUITING COMPLIANCE CALENDAR AUTOMATION: Automated recruiting calendar and communication management via Teamworks for college athletics must comply with NCAA recruiting calendar restrictions; automated recruiting communication outside NCAA-permitted contact periods creates NCAA violation and recruitment eligibility consequence. COLLECTIVE BARGAINING AGREEMENT ATHLETE DATA RIGHTS: Automated use of professional athlete schedule and performance data for analytics or commercial purposes must comply with applicable collective bargaining agreement athlete data rights provisions (NFL CBA, NBA CBA, NHLPA); automated commercial use of athlete data without CBA authorization creates labor grievance.

auth.notes: Teamworks uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Durham, North Carolina HQ. Founded 2012 by Zach Maurides. Private ($65M+ raised). 700+ professional and college athletic organizations. NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, college football Power 5. Athlete scheduling, communication, compliance, nutrition, equipment. ARMS compliance module for NCAA. Acquired Notemeal (nutrition) and Front Rush (recruiting CRM). Competes with Playmetrics and custom solutions for professional athlete management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription per organization
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per athletic program; module pricing for compliance (ARMS), nutrition (Notemeal), and recruiting (Front Rush); professional sports and college pricing tiers
pricing.notes: Durham NC. Private. Founded 2012. 700+ organizations. Annual enterprise subscription. Module pricing for compliance, nutrition, and recruiting add-ons.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; schedule and communication queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for event changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — SCHEDULE AND EVENT CHANGES REQUIRE POLLING: Teamworks does not support webhooks for schedule change and communication events; automated schedule conflict detection and travel update notifications require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with sports operations cadence (pre-game schedule lock, travel day alerts)

NCAA RECRUITING CALENDAR COMPLIANCE GATE: Automated NCAA recruiting calendar management via Teamworks ARMS module must apply sport-specific and year-in-school recruiting contact period restrictions; automated recruiting contact outside permissible periods (quiet period, dead period) creates NCAA Level I or II violation; implement NCAA recruiting calendar validation before automated recruit communication

ATHLETE MEDICAL STATUS ROLE-BASED ACCESS: Teamworks medical and injury status data requires HIPAA-compliant role-based access; automated coaching staff access to full athlete medical records beyond practice/game clearance status creates HIPAA and athlete confidentiality violation; implement minimum necessary access for athletic training data vs coaching staff access

MULTI-ACQUISITION PRODUCT API FRAGMENTATION: Teamworks has acquired Notemeal (nutrition), Front Rush (recruiting CRM), and ARMS (compliance); each acquired product may have separate API endpoints; automated workflows spanning scheduling, nutrition, and recruiting require managing potentially separate API surfaces per product

CBA ATHLETE DATA COMMERCIAL USE RESTRICTION: Automated use of professional athlete scheduling and personal data for analytics, media, or commercial purposes requires CBA authorization; major professional sports CBAs (NFL NFLPA, NBA NBPA) have specific provisions governing athlete data commercial use; consult league counsel before automated commercial data use

TRAVEL NOTIFICATION TIMING FOR COMPLIANCE: Automated travel itinerary distribution must account for NCAA travel party compliance rules (roster, staff, equipment limits by sport); automated travel document generation without sport-specific travel party limit validation creates NCAA travel compliance issue
agent_readiness.security_notes: Athlete management platform. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Athlete schedule, medical status, and personal operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Athlete operations. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Athlete schedule, medical, and personal data.
